## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss updates, challenges, and processes for the GrowthX Labs pod.](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New process: Create threads on Linear issues, bookmark in Slack, fill Andy's Airtable with deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Timekeeping sheets needed: Day-by-day, hour-by-hour breakdown of tasks for efficiency analysis](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Image handling in CMS needs improvement: Current process uses Dropbox links, automation opportunity identified](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Internal linking process clarified: Use Claude for internal links, Perplexity for external links with careful verification](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

## Topics

### Linear Issue Tracking

  - [Create threads on Linear issues](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Bookmark Slack thread links in internal channel for quick retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Start new threads on Mondays for weekly tracking](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Fill out Andy's Airtable with all deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### Timekeeping Process

  - [Detailed timesheets required: day-by-day, hour-by-hour breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Purpose: Understand task duration, identify time-consuming vs. efficient processes](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Mara to provide standardized template for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Sheet format preferred for simplicity](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

### CMS Image Handling

  - [Current process: Upload images to Dropbox, convert link to Markdown, insert in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Identified as inefficient, automation opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Timilehin to create SOP video for image process](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Ismail mentioned similar process for Rapid, potential for cross-team learning](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Internal Linking Process

  - [Use Claude for internal links (e.g., Rapid's blog links)](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Verify suggested anchor text and check for 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Use Perplexity for external links, focusing on specific searches](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Avoid using percentage statistics without external links](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Publishing Queue

  - [Ismail: No current articles in publishing queue](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Plan to do a dry run/overview of the process for next week's articles](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Timilehin: Create SOP video for image handling process in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Ismail: Prepare overview of publishing process for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Continue refining internal and external linking processes](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Team to remain vigilant about proper link verification and anchor text selection](https://fathom.video/share/A-p4EApQuaPcqhUxJBK98af3tp5jnvyd?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
